loading.doc: Generic loading placeholder used in lists / panes that haven't received data yet.

busy.doc: Generic in-flight status text shown while a skill call is running.

error.doc: Generic error prefix shown before any API error message, e.g. 'Fout: invalid-mnemonic'.

hero_title.doc: Hero heading on /welcome.html — first thing a brand-new user sees.

hero_intro.text: Een buurt-prikbord dat lokaal op jouw apparaat draait. Geen feed, geen reclame, jouw data blijft van jou.

new_title.doc: Title of the left-hand choice card on /welcome.html — link to /onboard.html.

new_body.text: Ik heb een uitnodigings-link of -code en wil voor het eerst lid worden van een groep.

restore_title.doc: Title of the right-hand choice card on /welcome.html — link to /restore.html.

restore_body.text: Ik heb mijn herstelzin (12 of 24 woorden) van een ander apparaat. Ik wil hem hier opnieuw gebruiken.

footer_hint.text: Geen voorkennis nodig — je doorloopt de stappen in een paar minuten. Je kunt later van apparaat wisselen door je herstelzin opnieuw te gebruiken.
footer_hint.doc: Reassurance footer at the bottom of /welcome.html.

heading.doc: Main page heading on /privacy.html. (Renamed from 'title' 2026-05-07 to match the page-pattern convention.)

intro.text: Stoop is een onderzoeks-preview. Onderstaande punten zijn nooit verstopt; ze gelden voor iedereen die meedoet.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /privacy.html. Sets the 'this is a research preview' framing.

data_location_heading.doc: H3 above the data-location list on /privacy.html: which provider hosts what.

unset_value.doc: Placeholder shown next to a privacy-row label when no value is configured (e.g. no pod attached).

row_relay_operator.doc: Label for the relay operator row in the data-location list.

row_relay_url.doc: Label for the relay server URL row.

row_pod_issuer.doc: Label for the pod provider (Solid OIDC issuer) row.

row_pod_root.doc: Label for the pod root URL row.

claims_heading.doc: Section heading above the per-item claim list on MineScreen (mobile).

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when no bundle is active.

intro.text: Stoop werkt out-of-the-box volledig lokaal. Een Solid-pod is optioneel: het maakt je posts en profiel portable tussen apparaten en geeft je controle over de opslag. Je kunt later aan- of afmelden zonder data te verliezen.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /sign-in.html. Contains <strong> tag — keep it.

issuer_label.doc: Label above the issuer URL input. Technical term — no translation strictly required.

submit.doc: Submit button on the sign-in form.

sign_out.doc: Submit button on the sign-out form.

pod_attached.doc: Status word shown when the pod is currently attached. Plugged into signed_in_html via {podLabel}.

pod_not_attached.doc: Status word shown when sign-in succeeded but pod-attach failed. Plugged into signed_in_html via {podLabel}.

signed_in_html.doc: Status line shown when signed in. Contains <strong> tag and two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {podLabel} (status word from pod_attached / pod_not_attached). Preserve all.

not_signed_in.text: Niet aangemeld bij een pod. Stoop draait lokaal.
not_signed_in.doc: Status line shown when no pod is attached.

signed_out.doc: Confirmation shown after a successful sign-out.

intro.text: Tellers van acties die deze agent in dit proces heeft gezien. In-memory — opnieuw nul bij herstart. Faciliteert beta-runbook § "Operational metrics".
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /metrics.html. Mentions the beta runbook and the in-memory nature of counters.

refresh.doc: Refresh button on /metrics.html — triggers an immediate reload of counters.

empty.text: Nog geen tellers — er is nog niets gebeurd in deze sessie.
empty.doc: Empty-state shown when the metrics map is empty (fresh process, no skill calls yet).

col_event.doc: Header of the first column in the metrics grid. The technical name of the counted event.

col_count.doc: Header of the second column — number of times the event fired.

col_last.doc: Header of the third column — timestamp of the most recent firing.

snapshot_at.doc: Footer line under the metrics grid. {ts} is a locale-formatted timestamp.

errors.peer_required: Kies eerst iemand om te muten.
errors.itemId_required: Kies eerst een post om te rapporteren.

post_form.hide_name_hint: Andere leden zien je handle (@…), niet je echte naam. Niet anoniem voor de server — de relay-operator ziet wel dat jij iets hebt gepost.

pictures_label.doc: Label of the picker on the post-form. Phase 39 — V2.5 picture attachments.

pictures_hint.text: Maximaal 4 foto's; ze worden lokaal kleiner gemaakt (max 1280px) voordat ze worden geplaatst. Andere leden zien een voorbeeld; de volledige foto wordt pas geladen wanneer iemand erop klikt.
pictures_hint.doc: Hint under the picker. Explains the 4-picture cap, the client-side resize, and the on-request loading.

pictures_resizing.doc: Inline status while images are being resized in the browser.

pictures_ready.doc: Inline status after a successful resize. {count} is an integer.

pictures_error.doc: Inline status when one or more images failed to resize. {count} is an integer.

open_picture.doc: ARIA label on a thumbnail in the feed. Triggers the modal that loads the full image.

close.doc: Close button label on the attachment modal.

picture_loading.doc: Modal status text shown while the full bytes are being fetched.

picture_pending.text: Foto wordt opgehaald — kan even duren als de afzender offline is.
picture_pending.doc: Modal status text shown when the requestAttachment skill returned `pending: true`. The fetch continues in the background.

attach_picture.doc: Tooltip on the camera icon next to the chat input. Phase 39 — V2.5 picture attachments. Used as the title attribute on the picker label.

permission_camera_rationale.text: Stoop wil de camera gebruiken om QR-codes te scannen en foto's bij posts te plaatsen.
permission_camera_rationale.doc: Permission rationale string shown when first asking for camera access on Android. Used by expo-camera + expo-image-picker. Stoop V3 Phase 40.5/40.6.

permission_gallery_rationale.text: Stoop wil toegang tot je foto's om er een aan een post toe te voegen.
permission_gallery_rationale.doc: Permission rationale shown when first asking for media-library access on Android. Used by expo-image-picker.

permission_location_rationale.text: Stoop wil je locatie ophalen om afstand-gefilterde posts te tonen.
permission_location_rationale.doc: Permission rationale shown when first asking for location access. Used by expo-location during the GPS-set flow on /profile.

permission_push_rationale.text: Stoop wil je een melding sturen wanneer iemand reageert op je post of een nieuw bericht stuurt.
permission_push_rationale.doc: Permission rationale shown right before the OS push prompt. Phase 40.9. Used after first group join, not at install (premature).

take_photo.doc: Camera-CTA on the post-form / chat input. Stoop V3 Phase 40.5.

pick_from_library.doc: Library-CTA next to the camera-CTA on the post-form. Stoop V3 Phase 40.5.

scan_qr.doc: Primary CTA on the welcome / onboard screen — opens the camera to a barcode scanner. Stoop V3 Phase 40.6.

scan_recognised_invite.doc: Inline status under the scanner camera preview when an invite QR is decoded.

scan_recognised_contact.doc: Inline status when a stoop-contact:// QR is decoded.

scan_recognised_recovery.doc: Inline status when a 12/24-word recovery phrase QR is decoded.

scan_unrecognised.doc: Inline status when a scanned QR doesn't match any known Stoop payload.

brand.doc: Brand wordmark on the welcome screen. Stoop V3 Phase 40.10.

tagline.text: Buurt-skill-app — vraag je buren om hulp.
tagline.doc: Sub-headline under the brand on the welcome screen.

cta_new.doc: Primary CTA on the welcome screen — generates a fresh local identity.

cta_scan.doc: Secondary CTA — opens the camera scanner.

cta_create_group.doc: Secondary CTA on WelcomeScreen — opens the CreateGroupScreen wizard.

privacy_link.doc: Footer link on the welcome screen.

subheading.text: Richt de camera op een Stoop-QR. Je kan ook plakken in plaats daarvan.

grant_camera.doc: Button shown when the OS hasn't granted camera permission yet.

paste_link.doc: Link below the camera surface that reveals the paste box.

paste_placeholder.text: Plak een Stoop-uitnodiging, contact-link of herstelzin

paste_submit.doc: Submit button for the paste-fallback textarea.

subheading.text: Voer je herstelzin in (12 of 24 woorden, gescheiden door spaties).

submitting.doc: Submit button label while the restore call is in flight.

status_too_short.doc: Inline status when the user has typed only a few words.

status_wrong_count.doc: Inline status when the word count is wrong.

status_malformed_word.text: Een woord lijkt niet kloppen — alleen kleine letters.
status_malformed_word.doc: Inline status when one of the words isn't BIP-39-shaped.

status_looks_ok.doc: Inline status when the structural check passes.

empty_no_items.text: Nog geen posts in deze buurt.
empty_no_items.doc: Empty state when the feed has no items at all.

empty_filtered.doc: Empty state when items exist but the active filter excludes them all.

kind_vraag.doc: Filter chip label for kind=vraag (asks/help-needed posts).

kind_aanbod.doc: Filter chip label for kind=aanbod (offer/help-available posts).

no_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om het prikbord te zien.
no_group.doc: Empty-state on mobile FeedScreen when no agent is active.

mine.doc: Bottom-tab label for the MineScreen (own posts).

kind_vraag.doc: Kind-toggle chip label for kind=vraag on PostComposeScreen.

kind_aanbod.doc: Kind-toggle chip label for kind=aanbod on PostComposeScreen.

distance_label.doc: Section heading above the distance ChipRow.

audience_hint_default.doc: Hint when no audience is selected.

audience_hint_n.doc: Hint when one or more targets are selected.

no_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om te kunnen posten.
no_group.doc: Empty-state when no agent is active.

scope_contacts.doc: Tickbox label on PostComposeScreen for the broader-scope option (Phase 40.20).

scope_hops.doc: Tickbox label on PostComposeScreen for the widest-scope option (Phase 40.20).

skills_label.doc: Section label above the skill chips.

submitting.doc: Submit CTA label while the call is in flight.

too_many_attachments.doc: Inline alert when the user exceeds MAX_ATTACHMENTS.

permission_denied.text: Stoop heeft geen toestemming voor camera/galerij.
permission_denied.doc: Inline error when the OS rejected the permission prompt.

section_local.text: Stoop draait op je toestel — er staat geen centrale server tussen.

section_pod.text: Als je een Solid-pod koppelt, beheer je je eigen data en wie er toegang heeft.

section_handles.text: Anderen zien standaard alleen je @handle. Je kan een echte naam laten zien aan wie jij wilt.

section_location.text: Je locatie wordt afgerond naar een 500m grid en alleen gedeeld als je dat aanzet.

section_no_thirdparty.text: Geen analytics, geen ad-trackers, geen cloud-providers behalve degene die jij kiest.

body.text: Koppel je Solid-pod om profiel + posts cross-device te synchroniseren.

preparing.doc: CTA label while DCR/discovery is still resolving (hook reports !ready).

continue.doc: CTA on SignInScreen step 2 — adopts tokens + attaches pod.

attaching.doc: CTA label while attachPod is in flight.

pod_root_label.doc: Label above pod-root input on SignInScreen step 2.

pod_root_hint.text: Standaard afgeleid van je WebID-origin. Pas alleen aan als je opslag elders draait.

error_pod_root_required.doc: Inline validation error when pod-root field is empty.

reset.doc: Recovery CTA when DCR/discovery cached a stale client_id.

placeholder.text: Pod-sign-in is in deze build niet aangesloten. V3 draait standaard lokaal; pod-koppeling komt in een volgende build.
placeholder.doc: Placeholder body shown until bring-up code wires useSignInHook.

issuer_label.doc: Label above the issuer URL input on mobile SignInScreen.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep voordat je een pod koppelt.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when SignInScreen is opened with no active bundle.

no_auth_url.text: Sign-in gaf geen auth-URL terug — probeer het opnieuw.
no_auth_url.doc: Inline error when startPodSignIn returned no URL.

pod_attached.doc: Status under the signed-in line when the pod is fully attached.

pod_not_attached.doc: Status under the signed-in line when sign-in succeeded but pod-attach hasn't completed.

busy.text: Bezig met afronden van de OIDC-flow…
busy.doc: Body shown while sign-in is wrapping up.

uploading.text: Lokale data wordt geüpload naar je pod…
uploading.doc: Body shown while bulk-sync is running.

done.doc: Body shown when bulk-sync finished cleanly.

error.text: Er ging iets mis tijdens de eerste sync.

heading.doc: Heading on OnboardJoinScreen — receiver-side of the QR-scan flow.

body.doc: Body line on OnboardJoinScreen, followed by the groupId value.

working.doc: Spinner label while addGroup + redeemMembershipCode run.

success.doc: Success line after the join completes.

peer_discovery_hint.text: Je toestel is nu lid van de groep. Posts van anderen verschijnen pas als de toestellen elkaar kunnen vinden — over hetzelfde Wi-Fi (mDNS) of via een relay.
peer_discovery_hint.doc: Hint after a successful join, explaining that visible posts depend on peer-discovery (which is a separate substrate concern).

retry.doc: Retry CTA after a failed join attempt.

no_invite.text: Geen geldige uitnodiging. Scan de QR opnieuw of laat de admin een nieuwe maken.
no_invite.doc: Empty state when route opened without an invite param.

heading.text: Toon deze QR aan je buurman

body.text: Laat het andere toestel deze QR scannen via het Stoop-welkomstscherm.

no_invite.text: Geen uitnodiging beschikbaar. Open dit scherm vanuit Groep → Maak uitnodiging.
no_invite.doc: Empty state when route opened without an invite param.

code_label.doc: Label above the membership code shown as text on OnboardIssueScreen — for users who can't scan the QR.

unavailable.text: Statistieken zijn niet aangesloten in deze build.
unavailable.doc: Empty state when bring-up code didn't pass a snapshot.

intro.text: Stoop draait lokaal op je toestel — er staat geen centrale server tussen jullie posts of berichten. Maar berichten reizen wel via een relay om bij elkaar te komen.

what_relay_sees_body.text:
De inhoud van je berichten is versleuteld — die ziet de relay niet. Maar wel:
• wie er met wie praat (metadata),
• hoe vaak en wanneer.

Vergelijk het met de buitenkant van een envelop op de post: het adres en de afzender zijn zichtbaar, ook al is de brief gesloten.

what_relay_does_not_body.text:
• Je posts, foto's, chat-inhoud — versleuteld.
• Je locatie tenzij je die expliciet deelt.
• Je echte naam tenzij je die zelf onthult.

Geen analytics, geen ad-trackers, geen cloud-providers buiten degene die jij kiest.

what_you_can_do_body.text:
• Roteer regelmatig je netwerk-adres (Instellingen → Privacy).
• Gebruik per-contact afspraken om wat je deelt te beperken.
• Lokale modus (alleen mDNS/BLE) — je raakt buurtgenoten op hetzelfde wifi-netwerk maar niet daarbuiten.

acknowledge.text: Ik begrijp het — laten we beginnen

busy.doc: CTA label while AsyncStorage is in flight.

intro.text: Anderen vragen om hulp die past bij jouw skills. Tik "Help" om te claimen.

anon.doc: Fallback handle when the requester isn't in the local roster.

claimed.doc: Status badge after the user claimed.

declined.doc: Status badge after the user declined.

errored.doc: Status badge after a failed decide call.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om voorgestelde matches te zien.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when no bundle is active.

unknown.doc: Empty state on ContactScreen when the route was opened without a resolved contact.

open_chat.doc: Primary CTA on ContactScreen — navigates to a 1:1 thread.

show_qr.doc: CTA — reveals the user's stoop-contact:// share QR.

qr_caption.text: Laat dit zien aan je contact om elkaar als bekend te markeren.

mute.doc: Mute action on ContactScreen — silences notifications.

confirm_mute_body.text: Je krijgt geen meldingen meer van dit contact.

confirm_block_body.text: Geblokkeerde contacten kunnen je geen berichten meer sturen.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when no active bundle.

confirm_remove_body.text: Dit contact wordt uit je lijst verwijderd.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om je gesprekken te zien.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when no bundle is active.

empty.doc: Empty state inside an open thread.

request_reveal.doc: CTA in the thread header that opens the bilateral-reveal flow.

revealing.doc: CTA label while the requestReveal call is in flight.

reveal_unavailable.text: Reveal-flow niet beschikbaar in deze build.
reveal_unavailable.doc: Alert shown when onRequestReveal is missing.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om gesprekken te zien.

no_peer.doc: Empty state when ChatThreadScreen is opened without a peerId.

unknown_item.doc: Empty state when ItemDetailScreen has no resolved item.

chat.doc: CTA — opens a 1:1 thread with the author.

respond.doc: Primary CTA on a non-self item — calls respondToItem.

responding.doc: Primary CTA label while in flight.

cancel.doc: Destructive CTA visible to the post author — cancelRequest.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om posts te bekijken.

unknown_member.doc: Empty state on ProfileOtherScreen when the route was opened without a member to render.

holiday_body.doc: Body text under the holiday heading.

location.doc: Section heading for the member's coarse location.

request_reveal.doc: CTA on ProfileOtherScreen — opens the bilateral-reveal flow.

open_chat.doc: CTA on ProfileOtherScreen — opens a 1:1 chat.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om profielen te bekijken.
no_active_group.doc: Empty-state on ProfileOtherScreen when there's no active bundle.

contact_detail.doc: Secondary CTA on ProfileOtherScreen that opens the per-contact settings screen (Phase 40.18).

intro_html.text: Je handle is wat anderen standaard zien — bv. @oosterpoort-bird-23. Je echte naam is optioneel en alleen zichtbaar voor wie je daar toestemming voor geeft.
intro_html.doc: Lead paragraph explaining the handle vs. real-name model. Contains <strong> and <code> tags.

avatar_clear.doc: Avatar 'remove / clear' button next to the file picker.

avatar_pick_image.doc: Inline error shown when the user tried to upload a non-image as avatar.

avatar_resizing.doc: Inline status while the avatar is being resized in the browser to 256px.

avatar_saved_kb.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful avatar save. {size} is the post-resize size in kilobytes.

avatar_cleared.doc: Inline confirmation after clearing the avatar.

handle_label.doc: Label of the handle input. Includes the constraint summary (lowercase, 3–32 chars).

handle_save.doc: Submit button for saving the handle.

handle_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful handle save. {handle} is the handle without the leading @.

display_name_label.doc: Label of the displayName input. Optional — user may leave it blank.

display_name_save.doc: Submit button for saving the display name.

display_name_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful display-name save.

default_render_heading.doc: H3 above the default-render block: a literal preview of the string other group members see.

default_render_others_see.doc: Browser-bridge form (single-brace placeholder) of the default-render line. {render} is the actual string (handle or display name) other members see.

is_revealed.doc: Suffix appended to the default-render line when the user has revealed their real name to this group.

handle_default.doc: Suffix appended to the default-render line when the user has NOT revealed their real name.

no_group_configured.doc: Placeholder shown when the bundle has no active group, so we can't compute a default-render.

no_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep — dan kan je je profiel invullen.
no_group.doc: Empty-state body on mobile ProfileMineScreen when the user hasn't joined a group yet. Stoop V3 mobile.

saving.doc: Generic in-flight label on mobile ProfileMineScreen submit buttons.

holiday_label.doc: Label next to the holiday-mode toggle on mobile ProfileMineScreen.

holiday_hint.text: Verberg je profiel tijdelijk: buren zien je niet als beschikbare match en push-meldingen pauzeren tot je het weer uitzet.

holiday_on.doc: Holiday-mode toggle label when the flag is set.

holiday_off.doc: Holiday-mode toggle label when the flag is unset.

location_heading.doc: H2 above the location section on mobile ProfileMineScreen.

location_clear.doc: Ghost button on mobile ProfileMineScreen that drops the user's location.

recovery_heading.doc: H2 above the recovery section on mobile ProfileMineScreen.

recovery_intro.text: Bewaar je herstelzin op een veilige plek. Je hebt hem nodig om Stoop op een ander toestel te installeren.

recovery_show.doc: CTA that reveals the user's mnemonic in a confirm modal.

recovery_close.doc: Confirm-modal label on the recovery-reveal modal.

recovery_unavailable.text: Recovery-export niet beschikbaar in deze build.

handle_empty.doc: Inline error on mobile ProfileMineScreen for empty handle.

handle_bad_chars.doc: Inline error for handle with disallowed characters.

me_initial.doc: Single-letter fallback shown in the avatar circle when the user has neither a handle nor a display name. The first letter is used.

skills_intro_html.text: Vink aan waar je in helpt — anderen zien dit in jouw profiel én het bepaalt welke vragen automatisch bij jou terechtkomen. Je kunt per skill optioneel trefwoorden toevoegen (bv. fiets, plak) en de status zetten op gepauzeerd of gearchiveerd.

skill_status_active.doc: Lower-case status label for an active skill (the user is available for this skill).

skill_status_paused.doc: Lower-case status label for a paused skill.

skill_status_archived.doc: Lower-case status label for an archived skill (kept for history; not used for matching).

skill_tags_placeholder.doc: Placeholder of the per-skill free-tags input. Comma-separated list expected.

skill_saving.doc: Inline status while a skill change is being persisted.

skill_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful skill change.

skill_tags_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after the per-skill tags blur-save.

no_categories.doc: Empty-state shown when listSkillCategories returned an empty array.

holiday_on.doc: Toggle-button label when holiday-mode is currently OFF (clicking turns it on).

holiday_off.doc: Toggle-button label when holiday-mode is currently ON (clicking turns it off).

holiday_active_html.text: Je staat op vakantie. Nieuwe vragen / aanbod stromen niet automatisch bij jou langs.
holiday_active_html.doc: Status text shown next to the holiday-mode toggle when ON. Contains <strong> tag.

holiday_inactive.text: Je bent beschikbaar voor automatische skill-matches.
holiday_inactive.doc: Status text shown next to the holiday-mode toggle when OFF.

location_intro.text: Een grof-gerasterde locatie (op 500m) maakt het mogelijk om posts te beperken tot een straal om jou heen, of om afstand te delen met vertrouwde contacten. Zonder locatie werkt Stoop gewoon door, maar zonder afstand-filter.
location_intro.doc: Lead paragraph for the location section. Explains the 500m grid + opt-in nature.

location_geocode_warn_html.text: ⚠️ Je zoekopdracht wordt naar OpenStreetMap (Nominatim) gestuurd om coördinaten op te halen. Je naam of WebID gaat niet mee.
location_geocode_warn_html.doc: Privacy warning under the geocode form. Contains <em> tag — keep the emphasis.

location_clear.doc: Button to clear the user's saved location.

location_search.doc: Submit button for the geocode query.

location_confirm.doc: Confirm button on the geocode preview card.

location_cancel.doc: Cancel button on the geocode preview card.

location_searching.doc: Inline status while the geocode skill is running.

location_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful setMyLocation.

location_none.doc: Status shown when no location is set on the user's profile.

location_current_html.doc: Status shown when a location IS set. {label} is human-readable place name; {cell} is the 500m geohash; {source} is e.g. 'geocode' or 'gps'. Contains <strong> + <span class="hint"> tags.

location_preview_html.doc:
Body of the geocode preview card before confirmation. {label} = human-readable, {cell} = geohash. Contains ,
, tags.

recovery_intro_html.text: Je herstelzin is de enige manier om je account terug te krijgen op een nieuw apparaat. We tonen hem één keer — schrijf hem op en bewaar hem ergens veilig (geen schermafbeelding).
recovery_intro_html.doc: Lead paragraph for the recovery section. Contains <strong> + <em> tags.

show_mnemonic.doc: Button to reveal the BIP-39 mnemonic phrase. Pressing it irreversibly marks the phrase as 'shown'.

mnemonic_already_shown.text: Herstelzin is al eerder getoond — uit veiligheid kan dat niet opnieuw.
mnemonic_already_shown.doc: Status shown when the user has already revealed the mnemonic in this install.

mnemonic_write_now.text: Schrijf deze 12 woorden nu over. Hij wordt niet opnieuw getoond.
mnemonic_write_now.doc: Status shown right after the mnemonic is revealed. Reminds the user to copy it down — no second chance.

mnemonic_unknown.doc: Defensive fallback shown when the getMnemonicOnce skill returned neither shown:true nor a phrase.

backup_intro.text: Maak een back-upbestand dat alleen jij met je wachtwoord kunt openen. Het wachtwoord verlaat dit apparaat niet.
backup_intro.doc: Lead paragraph for the encrypted-backup form. Explains client-side encryption.

backup_download.doc: Submit button for the encrypted-backup form.

backup_encrypting.doc: Inline status while the encryptedBackup skill is running.

backup_downloaded.text: Back-up gedownload. Bewaar het bestand én je wachtwoord apart.
backup_downloaded.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful backup download. Reminds the user to keep file and passphrase separate.

page_title.doc: Browser tab title for /onboard.html. Used in both redeem and issue mode.

redeem_hero_title.doc: Hero heading shown in redeem mode (?invite=…). Welcomes the just-invited user.

redeem_hero_intro.text: Je bent uitgenodigd voor een buurt-groep. Stoop draait op je eigen apparaat — er is geen centrale server. Je kunt later je gegevens meenemen of weer verwijderen.
redeem_hero_intro.doc: Hero subtitle in redeem mode. Reassures about local-first + portability.

gates_heading.doc: H2 above the privacy + house-rules accept gates.

gate_privacy_html.text: Ik ga akkoord met de privacy-toelichting: mijn posts en chats blijven binnen de groep, en ik kan ze later exporteren of verwijderen.
gate_privacy_html.doc: Label of the privacy-acceptance checkbox. Contains <strong> tag.

gate_rules_html.text: Ik heb de huisregels van de groep gelezen en ben ermee akkoord.
gate_rules_html.doc: Label of the house-rules-acceptance checkbox. Contains <strong> tag.

no_rules_yet.text: Deze groep heeft (nog) geen huisregels gepubliceerd.
no_rules_yet.doc: Status shown when getGroupRules returned no house rules — admin hasn't filled them in yet.

rules_fetch_failed.text: (Huisregels niet opgehaald — vraag de admin om de regels per chat door te geven.)
rules_fetch_failed.doc: Status shown when getGroupRules threw — likely the agent doesn't know this group's rules. Out-of-band fallback.

handle_heading.text: Kies je handle voor deze groep
handle_heading.doc: H3 above the handle input in redeem mode.

handle_intro_html.text: Anderen zien standaard alleen je handle (bv. @oosterpoort-vogel-12) — niet je echte naam. Je kunt later per chat een wederzijdse onthulling doen.
handle_intro_html.doc: Hint above the handle input. Contains <code> tag with example handle.

handle_label.doc: Label of the handle input (single word — the explanatory hint sits above).

redeem_submit.doc: Submit button on the redeem form.

after_join_label.doc: Lead-in for the post-join save-recovery-phrase link.

save_phrase_link.doc: Link text pointing at /profile.html after join. Trailing arrow is intentional.

invite_unreadable.doc: Error shown when ?invite=… can't be JSON-decoded.

gate_required.text: Vink beide vakjes aan om door te gaan.
gate_required.doc: Error shown when one of the privacy/rules checkboxes is unchecked at submit.

joining.doc: Status while redeemInvite is in flight.

refused.doc: Prefix shown before the gate-skill's error code.

joined_as.doc: Success status after a successful join. {handle} = displayName or chosen handle.

issue_heading.doc: H2 in issue mode (admin generating an invite link).

issue_intro.text: Genereer een link voor één nieuwe member. Stuur 'm out-of-band: appje, mail, papieren briefje. De link is eenmalig en verloopt na de TTL.
issue_intro.doc: Lead paragraph in issue mode. Reinforces out-of-band distribution + single-use semantics.

ttl_label.doc: Label of the TTL number input.

invite_result_heading.text: Stuur deze link naar de nieuwe member
invite_result_heading.doc: H3 above the generated invite link.

invite_result_hint.text: Eenmalig bruikbaar; verloopt zodra de TTL voorbij is.

copy.doc: Copy-link button label. Reused on the toggle back to non-copied state.

copied.doc: Temporary button label after a successful copy. Replaced by 'copy' again after 1.2s.

no_invite_admin_only.text: Geen uitnodiging ontvangen — ben je admin van deze groep?
no_invite_admin_only.doc: Error shown when issueInvite returned no invite. Most likely cause is non-admin caller.

intro_html.text: Contacten zijn los van groepen. Met vertrouwde contacten kun je extra dingen delen (locatie, posts buiten groepen om). Bekende contacten zien alleen wat je expliciet deelt.
intro_html.doc: Lead paragraph explaining contact vs. group separation + the trust levels. Contains <em> tag.

empty.text: Nog geen contacten. Voeg er een toe via QR of handmatig.

request_wants_to_add_html.doc: Body of an incoming-contact-request card. {label} = handle/webid, {trust} = 'bekend' or 'vertrouwd'. Contains <em> tag.

accept.doc: Accept button on an incoming contact request.

decline.doc: Decline / ignore button on an incoming contact request.

trust_bekend.doc: Trust-level label for 'acquainted' contacts (lower trust). Reused as select option text + as a chip.

trust_vertrouwd.doc: Trust-level label for 'trusted' contacts (higher trust). Reused as select option text + as a chip.

trust_offer_bekend.doc: QR trust-offer option: share as 'bekend'. The 'als' prefix means 'as'.

flag_share_location.doc: Per-contact toggle: share my location with this contact.

flag_hop_through.doc: Per-contact toggle: let this contact relay messages through my device.

flag_auto_match.doc: Per-contact toggle: accept auto-skill-match suggestions from this contact.

flag_on.doc: Lower-case 'on' suffix for per-contact flag buttons.

flag_off.doc: Lower-case 'off' suffix for per-contact flag buttons.

tags_placeholder.doc: Placeholder for the per-contact tags input.

remove_confirm.doc: JS confirm() dialog before removing a contact. {webid} is the contact's WebID URL.

qr_heading.doc: H3 for the QR / paste-link sub-flow.

qr_intro_html.text: Toon iemand jouw QR (zij scannen 'm in hun Stoop), óf plak hun stoop-contact://-link hier.
qr_intro_html.doc: Hint under the QR heading. Contains <code> tag for the URL scheme.

qr_paste_label_html.doc: Label of the paste-link input. Contains <code> tag for the URL scheme.

add_button.doc: Submit button — reused on multiple add-contact forms.

added.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful add.

added_named.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful QR-add. {name} = handle, webid, or the contact_fallback string.

contact_fallback.doc: Fallback word when the added contact has no handle and no webid yet, used inside added_named's {name} slot.

qr_card_intro.text: Stuur deze link / toon de QR:
qr_card_intro.doc: Lead text above the user's own share-QR payload.

qr_card_footer.text: Geldig tot je hem opnieuw genereert. Je kunt de link kopiëren of door een QR-renderer halen.
qr_card_footer.doc: Hint under the user's own share-QR payload. Tells the user the QR is valid until regenerated.

manual_webid_label.doc: Label of the manual WebID input.

manual_pubkey_label.doc: Label of the manual pubKey input.

manual_pubkey_placeholder.text: optioneel — dan kunnen we ze pas bereiken na een eerste hello
manual_pubkey_placeholder.doc: Placeholder under the pubKey input. Explains the consequence of leaving it empty.

manual_trust_label.doc: Label of the trust-level select on the manual form.

lists_intro_html.text: Eigen indeling van je contacten — bv. buurmoeders of familie. Lijsten zijn lokaal aan jou; de contacten zelf zien deze niet.
lists_intro_html.doc: Lead paragraph for the contact-lists section. Contains <em> tags. Stresses that lists are private to the local user.

new_list_button.doc: Submit button for creating a new contact list.

rename.doc: Rename button on a contact list.

delete.doc: Delete button on a contact list.

list_rename_prompt.doc: JS prompt() for renaming a contact list.

list_delete_confirm.doc: JS confirm() before deleting a contact list.

list_empty_inline.doc: Inline placeholder when a contact list has no members.

contact_count_one.doc: Singular form of the per-list contact-count chip. {n} = 1.

contact_count_many.doc: Plural form of the per-list contact-count chip. {n} = 0 or >=2.

search_placeholder.doc: Placeholder of the mobile ContactsScreen search box. Stoop V3 mobile.

muted.doc: Inline tag next to a contact's name when muted (mobile).

empty_no_contacts.doc: Empty state on mobile ContactsScreen when the list is empty.

empty_filtered.doc: Empty state on mobile ContactsScreen when the search filter excludes everything.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om je contacten te zien.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state when no bundle is active.

intro.text: Ontvang een melding op dit apparaat als er iets gebeurt — ook als Stoop op de achtergrond staat. Werkt via je browser; je kunt de toestemming altijd intrekken via de browser-instellingen.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /push.html. Explains background-aware notifications + that the user can always revoke from browser settings.

subscribe.doc: Button label to enable push notifications. Triggers Web-Push subscribe + permission prompt.

unsubscribe.doc: Button label to disable push notifications.

test.doc: Button label that fires a self-test push so the user can verify delivery.

unsupported.text: Deze browser ondersteunt geen Web Push.
unsupported.doc: Status line shown when Service Worker / PushManager is missing (older browsers, some embedded WebViews).

no_vapid.text: Push is op deze server uitgeschakeld — vraag de admin om een VAPID-sleutel te configureren.
no_vapid.doc: Status line shown when the relay operator hasn't configured a VAPID key, so push isn't possible.

status_subscribed_html.doc: Status line shown when a push subscription exists. Contains <code> tag and {perm} placeholder (browser Notification.permission value, e.g. 'granted').

status_not_subscribed_html.doc: Status line shown when no push subscription exists yet. Contains <code> tag and {perm} placeholder.

subscribed_ok.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful subscribe.

unsubscribed_ok.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful unsubscribe.

test_sending.doc: Inline status while a test push is in flight.

test_body.doc: Body of the test push notification (visible in the OS notification UI).

test_result.doc: Inline status after the test push. {delivered} and {failed} are integer counts.

enable.doc: CTA on mobile PushScreen — kicks off requestPushPermission + setupPush. Stoop V3 mobile.

enabling.doc: CTA label while in flight on mobile PushScreen.

enabled.doc: Idle CTA label after enable succeeded on mobile PushScreen.

status_unknown.doc: Status panel on mobile PushScreen when push hasn't been turned on yet.

status_denied.text: Toestemming geweigerd. Schakel meldingen in via Instellingen.
status_denied.doc: Status panel on mobile when permission was denied.

status_granted_no_agent.doc: Status panel when perm is granted but the agent isn't running yet on mobile.

status_no_token.doc: Status panel when expo didn't return a token on mobile.

status_enabled.doc: Success status panel on mobile PushScreen.

intro.text: Een groep starten is geen technische ingreep. Het is een afspraak tussen leden. Beantwoord de zes vragen hieronder; ze worden samen het reglement van de groep, zichtbaar voor iedereen die later lid wordt.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /create-group.html. Frames group creation as a social agreement, not a technical setup. Contains <strong> tag.

q1_name.doc: Field label for the group's display name. Numbered question.

q1_purpose.doc: Field label for the two-sentence purpose statement.

q1_purpose_ph.text: bv. Buurtgenoten in Groningen-Oosterpoort die elkaar willen helpen met klusjes, lenen en weten wat er speelt.
q1_purpose_ph.doc: Placeholder for the purpose textarea. Example for a Groningen-Oosterpoort buurt.

q2_admins.text: 2. Wie is admin? (WebID's, één per regel)
q2_admins.doc: Field label for the admins-list textarea.

q2_admins_hint.text: We raden minstens twee admins aan.
q2_admins_hint.doc: Hint under the admins textarea recommending two admins.

q3_rules.text: 3. Huisregels — wat hoort er wel/niet bij? (één per regel)
q3_rules.doc: Field label for the house-rules textarea.

q3_rules_ph.text:
Vragen, aanbod, lenen.
Voertaal: Nederlands.
Geen reclame, geen politiek.
q3_rules_ph.doc: Placeholder for the house-rules textarea, multi-line example.

q4_conflict.doc: Field label for the conflict-resolution policy select.

q4_conflict_admin.doc: Conflict policy option: admin makes the call.

q4_conflict_mediation.text: Gesprek tussen betrokkenen, admin als getuige
q4_conflict_mediation.doc: Conflict policy option: mediated conversation, admin observes.

q5_access.doc: Field label for the access-policy select.

q5_invite_only.text: Op uitnodiging — admin geeft QR persoonlijk
q5_invite_only.doc: Access policy option: invite-only via admin-issued QR.

q5_shared_link.text: Via doorgegeven link — leden mogen anderen toevoegen
q5_shared_link.doc: Access policy option: members may forward the invite.

q5_approval.doc: Access policy option: admin approves each join request.

q6_leave.doc: Field label for the leave-policy select.

q6_keep_posts.text: Posts blijven, naam verdwijnt (default — bewaart context)
q6_keep_posts.doc: Leave policy option: posts kept, attribution stripped on leave.

q6_remove_all.text: Alles van die persoon verdwijnt (clean break)
q6_remove_all.doc: Leave policy option: all of the leaving member's content removed.

intro_mobile.text: Een groep is een afspraak tussen leden. Je wordt automatisch admin van de groep die je aanmaakt; daarna kun je een uitnodiging sturen.

id_label.doc: Label for the group-id input on mobile CreateGroupScreen.

id_placeholder.doc: Placeholder for the group-id input on mobile.

name_label.doc: Label for the display-name input on mobile.

name_placeholder.doc: Placeholder for the display-name input on mobile.

purpose_label.doc: Label for the purpose textarea on mobile.

purpose_placeholder.text: bv. Buurtgenoten in Oosterpoort die elkaar willen helpen.
purpose_placeholder.doc: Placeholder for the purpose textarea on mobile.

creating.doc: CTA label while createGroupV2 is in flight.

group_id_label.doc: Field label for the technical group-id input. Lowercase only — used in pod paths.

rotation_legend.doc: Legend of the key-rotation fieldset. Frames rotation as 'keeping the group fresh'.

rotation_intro.text: De groep gebruikt elke X dagen een nieuwe code. Wie de code niet meer krijgt, valt automatisch uit de groep. De code wissel je buiten de app om uit — bv. via WhatsApp, in een briefje, of in persoon. Dat houdt de groep lokaal.
rotation_intro.doc: Hint under the rotation legend. Contains <em> + <strong> tags AND mentions the in-person / out-of-band channel deliberately.

rotation_admin_only_label.text: Alleen admins delen de code uit.
rotation_admin_only_label.doc: Bold label for the admin-only rotation radio.

rotation_admin_only_hint.text: Admins genereren elke X dagen een nieuwe code en geven die persoonlijk door aan leden.
rotation_admin_only_hint.doc: Hint under the admin-only rotation radio.

rotation_peer_label.doc: Bold label for the peer-distributable rotation radio.

rotation_peer_hint.text: Elk lid kan de code aan iemand nieuw geven. Decentraler — admin is geen single point of failure.
rotation_peer_hint.doc: Hint under the peer-distributable rotation radio.

rotation_days_label.doc: Label above the rotation-period number input. Trailing ellipsis is intentional.

saving.doc: Inline status while createGroupV2 is running.

created_msg.doc: Inline success status. {groupId} is the new group's id.

result_heading.doc: Heading of the success card shown after group creation.

result_intro.text: De eerste membership-code is hieronder — geef 'm buiten Stoop om aan de eerste leden:
result_intro.doc: Lead text above the first membership code. Reinforces the out-of-band-distribution rule.

result_expiry.doc: Expiry line under the membership code. {date} is locale-formatted, {days} is the rotation period in days, {mode} is the human-readable rotation mode (see mode_admin_only / mode_peer).

result_footer.text: Je kunt 'm later opnieuw bekijken op de groep-pagina.
result_footer.doc: Footer hint under the result card.

mode_admin_only.text: alleen admins delen de code uit
mode_admin_only.doc: Lower-case description of admin-only rotation, plugged into result_expiry's {mode}.

mode_peer.doc: Lower-case description of peer-distributable rotation, plugged into result_expiry's {mode}.

feed.doc: Top-nav link to the main feed page (/).

my_posts.doc: Top-nav link to /mine.html — the user's own posts.

chat.doc: Top-nav link to /chat.html — peer-to-peer chat threads.

contacts.doc: Top-nav link to /contacts.html — the user's contact book.

metrics.doc: Top-nav link to /metrics.html — diagnostic metrics page.

profile.doc: Top-nav link to /profile.html — user's own profile + handle.

pod.doc: Top-nav link to /sign-in.html — Solid pod sign-in / status.

push.doc: Top-nav link to /push.html — Web-Push subscription management.

onboard.doc: Top-nav link to /onboard.html — admin invite / onboarding tools.

eviction_banner_title.doc: Heading of the orange banner on /group.html shown when one or more members' codes have expired past the grace window.

eviction_banner_intro.text: Voor één of meer leden is de membership-code verlopen — hun posts worden verborgen totdat ze de nieuwe code inwisselen.
eviction_banner_intro.doc: Lead paragraph in the eviction banner. Explains the auto-evict behaviour from Phase 35 (V2.5).

eviction_member_html.doc: Single list item inside the eviction banner. Contains a <strong> tag and two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {date} (locale-formatted timestamp). Preserve both.

unnamed.doc: Heading fallback when group.name is missing on mobile GroupScreen.

evicted_title.text: Je bent uit deze groep verwijderd.
evicted_title.doc: Eviction banner title on mobile GroupScreen.

evicted_body.text: Je kan posts en berichten in deze groep niet meer zien. Vraag de admin opnieuw uitgenodigd te worden.
evicted_body.doc: Eviction banner body on mobile GroupScreen.

member_count.doc: Label for the member-count row on mobile GroupScreen.

admin_code.doc: Label for the admin-code row on mobile GroupScreen (admin only).

admin_code_hint.text: Deel deze code alleen met andere admins.
admin_code_hint.doc: Hint under the admin code on mobile GroupScreen.

issue_invite.doc: Admin CTA on mobile GroupScreen — generates a fresh invite token + opens OnboardIssue.

issuing.doc: CTA label while issuing on mobile.

confirm_leave_body.text: Je verliest de toegang tot alle posts en berichten in deze groep.

confirm_leave_yes.doc: Destructive confirm label on mobile GroupScreen.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state on mobile GroupScreen when there's no active bundle.

rotate_code.doc: Admin CTA on mobile GroupScreen — calls rotateMyGroupCode.

rotating.doc: CTA label while rotateMyGroupCode is in flight.

admin_code_expires.doc: Hint under the admin code showing the expiry + rotation cadence.

no_code.text: Geen actieve code gevonden. Probeer "Roteer code nu" om een nieuwe te maken.
no_code.doc: Inline error on mobile GroupScreen when both getCurrentMembershipCode and rotateMyGroupCode failed to surface a code.

peers_label.doc: Section label on mobile GroupScreen showing live peer connectivity (skillMatch + mirror + transport names).

peers_value.doc: Connectivity counts on mobile GroupScreen. {sm}=number of peers in SkillMatch, {mr}=number of peers in the broadcast mirror, {tx}=registered transport names (mdns, relay, etc.).

peers_hint.text: Match: peers waarvan we matchmaking-broadcasts ontvangen. Mirror: peers waarvan we posts in het prikbord mirrorren. 0 = ontdek-laag bereikt het andere toestel niet (zelfde Wi-Fi? dev client opnieuw gebouwd na permissie-fix? relay-URL ingesteld?).
peers_hint.doc: Hint under the connectivity counts explaining what 0/0 means.

items_value.doc: Item count line on GroupScreen — counts open items in the local store. Helps separate "discovery works but replication doesn't" from "discovery itself is broken".

self_pk.doc: Self-pubkey prefix shown above the connectivity counts so the user can verify which side is which when comparing two phones.

match_peers.doc: Comma-separated pubkey prefixes of peers in the SkillMatch routing table.

mirror_peers.doc: Comma-separated pubkey prefixes of peers the broadcast-mirror is subscribed to.

reprobe.doc: Manual re-discover button on GroupScreen — triggers gossip + hello to all PeerGraph entries to break out of asymmetric mDNS state.

reprobe_busy.doc: Re-probe button label while the gossip + hellos run.

reprobe_done.doc: Inline confirmation after Re-probe finishes — {n} = number of hellos sent.

page_title.doc: Browser tab title for /auth-callback.html, the OIDC redirect target page.

busy.text: Bezig met afronden van de OIDC-flow…
busy.doc: Initial status line shown while completePodSignIn is running, before bulk-sync starts.

uploading.text: Bezig met uploaden van je lokale data naar je pod…
uploading.doc: Status line shown when bulk-sync transitions to 'running' (Phase 34, V2.5).

progress.doc: Progress label under the bar. {done} and {total} are integer counts of bulk-sync paths; do not localise the placeholders.

signed_in_html.doc: Success line after sign-in. Contains <strong> + <code> tags AND two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {podRoot} (URL); preserve both.

synced_summary.doc: Single-line summary shown after a clean bulk-sync finish. {count} is an integer.

sync_partial.text: Aangemeld; sommige data kon nog niet geüpload worden — Stoop probeert het op de achtergrond opnieuw.
sync_partial.doc: Warning line shown when bulk-sync ends with phase 'error'.

back_link.doc: Bottom-of-page link back to /sign-in.html. Trailing arrow is intentional.

done.doc: Body shown when bulk-sync finished cleanly (mobile).

error.text: Er ging iets mis tijdens de eerste sync.

intro.text: Stoop bewaart je instellingen op twee plekken: dingen die op dit apparaat horen (zoals hoe vaak je telefoon ververst) blijven lokaal; mijn voorkeuren reizen via je pod mee naar al je apparaten.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph explaining the device/shared split. Contains <em> tags — keep them so the emphasis is preserved.

section_device_title.doc: Section heading for device-scoped settings (V2.5 Phase 33). Stays local to this install.

badge_device.doc: Small badge next to the device-section heading. Single word; should signal 'this device only'.

section_device_hint.text: Deze instellingen horen bij dít apparaat. Op je telefoon en je laptop kunnen ze verschillen.
section_device_hint.doc: Subtitle under the device-section heading. Reassures the user the values can differ across their installs.

section_shared_title.doc: Section heading for shared / pod-portable settings (V2.5 Phase 33). Travels with the user.

badge_shared.doc: Small badge next to the shared-section heading. Should signal 'syncs across devices'.

section_shared_hint.text: Deze voorkeuren horen bij jou — niet bij dit apparaat. Als je inlogt op je pod, reizen ze automatisch mee naar je andere apparaten.
section_shared_hint.doc: Subtitle under the shared-section heading. Tells the user pod-sign-in is what enables cross-device sync.

poll_interval_label.doc: Label for the polling-interval select. Device-scoped.

poll_interval_hint.text: Lager = sneller nieuwe posts zien; hoger = zuiniger met data en accu.
poll_interval_hint.doc: Hint under the polling-interval label. Trade-off summary: faster vs. battery.

poll_2s.doc: Polling option: 2 seconds. The '(live)' annotation marks it as the always-on default.

hop_label.doc: Label for the global hop-relay toggle. Device-scoped because it's a per-machine routing decision.

hop_hint.text: Mag mijn apparaat berichten doorrelay'en voor andere mensen? Standaard uit: dan doet niemand dat via jou. Per-contact-instelling staat op de contacten-pagina.
hop_hint.doc: Hint under the hop-relay toggle. Default-off explanation + cross-link to /contacts.html. Contains <em> tags.

toggle_on.doc: Generic 'on' label next to a toggle. Reused across multiple toggles on /settings.html.

online_window_heading.doc: Sub-heading inside the device section for the mobile-only online-window controls.

online_window_hint.text: Op telefoon (V3): hoe vaak en hoe lang mag mijn agent zich tijdelijk verbinden met de relay? Op desktop genegeerd — daar is de agent altijd online.
online_window_hint.doc: Hint paragraph under the online-window heading. Mobile-only feature description.

online_every_label.doc: Label for the online-window 'every X minutes' field. Device-scoped.

online_every_hint.text: Eens per X minuten verbinden. Leeg = altijd verbonden (V2 desktop default).
online_every_hint.doc: Hint under the window-frequency input. Explains empty-means-always.

online_duration_label.doc: Label for the online-window 'duration in seconds' field. Device-scoped.

online_empty_placeholder.doc: Placeholder text in the online-window number inputs when no value is set. Should signal 'optional / unset'.

broadcastable_label.doc: Label for the broadcastable toggle. Shared-scoped.

broadcastable_hint.text: Mag een onbekend contact mij een skill-match-suggestie sturen die door mijn agent gefilterd wordt? Bij een match krijg je een melding; geen match = stilte.
broadcastable_hint.doc: Hint under the auto-skill-match toggle. Explains the filtering + match-only-notification semantics.

default_share_location_label.text: Standaard locatie delen met nieuwe contacten?
default_share_location_label.doc: Label for the default-share-location toggle. Shared-scoped.

default_share_location_hint.text: Bepaalt of shareLocation default aan staat als je iemand toevoegt. Per-contact altijd handmatig aan/uit te zetten.
default_share_location_hint.doc: Hint under the default-share-location toggle. Contains <code> tag for the field name.

feedback_saving.doc: Inline feedback text shown while a settings save is in flight.

feedback_saved.doc: Inline feedback text shown after a successful settings save.

shared_heading.doc: Mobile section heading for the cross-device portion of settings (Stoop V3 mobile).

device_heading.doc: Mobile section heading for the per-device portion (Stoop V3 mobile).

privacy_heading.doc: Mobile section heading on SettingsScreen (Stoop V3 mobile).

handle.doc: Label for the user handle row on mobile SettingsScreen.

display_name.doc: Label for the displayName row on mobile SettingsScreen.

location.doc: Label for the location row on mobile SettingsScreen.

location_unset.doc: Empty marker when no location is set on mobile SettingsScreen.

edit_profile.doc: CTA on mobile SettingsScreen — navigates to ProfileMine.

poll_interval.doc: Label for the pollIntervalMs input on mobile SettingsScreen.

poll_hint.doc: Inline hint under the poll-interval input on mobile.

saving.doc: Submit button label while in flight on mobile.

push_link.doc: Link to PushScreen from mobile SettingsScreen.

privacy_link.doc: Link to PrivacyScreen from mobile SettingsScreen.

group_heading.doc: Section heading on mobile SettingsScreen for the group-management entry point.

group_link.doc: Link from SettingsScreen to GroupScreen — opens group QR, member list, leave-group.

group_link_hint.text: Bekijk leden, maak een uitnodiging-QR, verlaat de groep.

create_another_group.doc: Link from SettingsScreen to CreateGroupScreen — for users who want to create a second/additional group.

group_active_marker.doc: Suffix appended to the active-group row in the multi-group manage list on SettingsScreen.

scan_invite_link.doc: Link from SettingsScreen to OnboardScanScreen — for users who want to join an existing group via QR scan.

relay_url_label.doc: Label above the relay-URL TextInput in SettingsScreen. Optional fallback transport when phones can't reach each other on the LAN.

relay_url_hint.text: Voor toestellen die elkaar niet over het lokale Wi-Fi-netwerk vinden. Vul ws://<host>:8787 in. Wijzigingen treden pas op na herstart van de app.
relay_url_hint.doc: Hint under the relay-URL input — explains when to use it and that a restart is required.

relay_url_save.doc: Submit button for the relay-URL input.

relay_url_saved.text: Opgeslagen. Herstart de app om te activeren.
relay_url_saved.doc: Inline confirmation after saving the relay URL — bundle is built at boot, so a restart is needed.

no_active_group.text: Sluit eerst aan bij een groep om instellingen te beheren.
no_active_group.doc: Empty state on mobile SettingsScreen when no bundle is active.

rotate_identity_label.doc: Section label for the rotate-identity CTA (Phase 40.22).

rotate_identity_hint.text: Vervangt je publieke sleutel met een verse. Je stableId blijft gelijk — contacten en mute-lijsten volgen je. 7 dagen genade-periode voor in-flight berichten.

rotating_identity.doc: CTA label while rotation is in flight.

confirm_rotate_body.text: Je publieke sleutel wordt vervangen. Berichten van peers die de rotatie nog niet kennen worden 7 dagen lang met je oude sleutel ontsleuteld (genade-periode). Dit is een privacy-maatregel — niet ongedaan te maken.

broadcastable_hint.text: Aan = je krijgt voorgestelde matches uit de bredere connectielijst (groepen + contacten + hops). Uit = stilte.

default_share_location.text: Locatie standaard delen met nieuwe contacten

default_share_location_hint.text: Per-contact altijd handmatig aan/uit te zetten.

online_window_hint.text: Hoe vaak en hoe lang verbindt je telefoon op de achtergrond? Leeg = altijd via push.

hop_label.text: Sta hop-relay door mijn toestel toe

hop_hint.text: Mag mijn toestel berichten voor anderen doorgeven? Default uit (zuinig met batterij).

page_title.doc: Browser tab title + main page heading on /restore.html — the recovery-from-mnemonic flow.

intro.text: Heb je je herstelzin (12 of 24 woorden) van een ander apparaat? Voer hem hieronder in. Daarna logt je app in op je pod en haalt al je oude posts, contacten en instellingen op.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /restore.html. Sets expectations: (1) you need a recovery phrase from another device, (2) the app will pull state from your pod after restoring.

step1_heading.doc: Heading of step 1 of /restore.html: the user types their 12-or-24-word BIP-39 phrase.

step1_hint.text: De zin verlaat dit apparaat niet. We checken eerst of hij geldig is.
step1_hint.doc: Reassurance subtext under step 1: phrase is processed locally, validated before any state change.

step1_placeholder.doc: Placeholder inside the textarea where the user types the recovery phrase. 'bv.' is short for 'bijvoorbeeld' (e.g.). Does NOT need to be a real BIP-39 phrase.

step1_button.doc: Submit button on step 1 — runs validateMnemonicPhrase skill.

step1_status_busy.doc: Inline status text shown while the validation skill is running.

step1_status_ok.doc: Inline status text shown after successful mnemonic validation; advances to step 2.

step2_heading.doc: Heading of step 2 of /restore.html: user reviews the derived pubKey and confirms the destructive swap.

step2_body.text: Dit zou je publieke sleutel worden:
step2_body.doc: Lead text in step 2 above the pubKey preview block.

step2_warning.text: ⚠️ Bevestigen overschrijft de huidige identiteit op dit apparaat. Posts / contacten / instellingen die nu lokaal staan worden vervangen zodra Stoop opnieuw start.
step2_warning.doc: Warning box in step 2 — explains the destructive nature of restoring. The 'als Stoop opnieuw start' hint is legacy V2 wording (Phase 31 made this immediate); revisit when re-translating.

step2_confirm.doc: Primary action button in step 2 — triggers restoreFromMnemonic skill with confirm:true.

step2_cancel.doc: Secondary button in step 2 — cancels the restore + returns to step 1.

step2_status_busy.doc: Inline status text while the restore skill is running.

step2_confirm_prompt.text: Weet je het zeker? De huidige identiteit op dit apparaat wordt overschreven.
step2_confirm_prompt.doc: Browser confirm() prompt shown when the user clicks Confirm. Last chance to back out.

step3_heading.doc: Heading of step 3 of /restore.html: success screen. Tells the user the swap completed and they're under the recovered identity.

step3_body.text: De herstelde identiteit is direct actief. Geen herstart nodig.
step3_body.doc: Lead text in step 3. Phase 31 removed the manual restart step.

step3_hint.text: Wil je je oude posts, contacten en instellingen op dit apparaat terughalen? Log in op je pod — dat trekt automatisch alles op. Anders kun je gewoon doorgaan.
step3_hint.doc: Hint paragraph in step 3 explaining the optional pod-sign-in for full state restore.

step3_pod_button.doc: Button in step 3 linking to /sign-in.html for the optional pod sync.

step3_home_button.doc: Secondary button in step 3 linking to / (the buurt-prikbord) for users who don't need pod sync.

nav_back.doc: Back link in the page header — returns to /welcome.html.
